name: 聰明錢掃描
三重篩選
description: WMA↑ + MFI↑ + VWAP↑ 同時上升
code:
def scan(data, params):
    results = []
    min_vol = params.get('min_vol', 500000)
    limit = params.get('limit', 20)
    
    for code, ind in data.items():
        vol = safe_int(ind.get('volume', 0))
        if vol < min_vol:
            continue
        
        wma20 = safe_float(ind.get('wma20'))
        wma20_prev = safe_float(ind.get('wma20_prev'))
        mfi = safe_float(ind.get('mfi14'))
        mfi_prev = safe_float(ind.get('mfi14_prev'))
        vwap = safe_float(ind.get('vwap20'))
        vwap_prev = safe_float(ind.get('vwap20_prev'))
        
        if wma20 > wma20_prev and mfi > mfi_prev and vwap > vwap_prev:
            score = mfi
            results.append((code, score, ind))
    
    results.sort(key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
    return results[:limit]

name: 均線多頭排列
code:
def scan(data, params):
    results = []
    min_vol = params.get('min_vol', 500000)
    limit = params.get('limit', 20)
    
    for code, ind in data.items():
        vol = safe_int(ind.get('volume', 0))
        if vol < min_vol:
            continue
        
        ma3 = safe_float(ind.get('ma3'))
        ma20 = safe_float(ind.get('ma20'))
        ma60 = safe_float(ind.get('ma60'))
        ma120 = safe_float(ind.get('ma120'))
        ma200 = safe_float(ind.get('ma200'))
        
        if ma3 > ma20 > ma60 > ma120 > ma200 and ma200 > 0:
            score = (ma3 / ma200 - 1) * 100
            results.append((code, score, ind))
    
    results.sort(key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
    return results[:limit]

name: VP 上緣突破
code:
def scan(data, params):
    results = []
    min_vol = params.get('min_vol', 500000)
    limit = params.get('limit', 20)
    
    for code, ind in data.items():
        vol = safe_int(ind.get('volume', 0))
        if vol < min_vol:
            continue
        
        close = safe_float(ind.get('close'))
        vp_upper = safe_float(ind.get('vp_upper'))
        
        if close > 0 and vp_upper > 0 and close > vp_upper:
            distance = (close / vp_upper - 1) * 100
            results.append((code, distance, ind))
    
    results.sort(key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=False)
    return results[:limit]

name: MFI 資金流入
月KD 黃金交叉
description: K > D 且兩者同時上升
code:
def scan(data, params):
    results = []
    min_vol = params.get('min_vol', 500000)
    limit = params.get('limit', 20)
    
    for code, ind in data.items():
        vol = safe_int(ind.get('volume', 0))
        if vol < min_vol:
            continue
        
        k = safe_float(ind.get('month_k'))
        d = safe_float(ind.get('month_d'))
        k_prev = safe_float(ind.get('month_k_prev'))
        d_prev = safe_float(ind.get('month_d_prev'))
        
        if k > d and k > k_prev and d > d_prev:
            score = k - d
            results.append((code, score, ind))
    
    results.sort(key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
    return results[:limit]

name: 均線乖離
